productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Torment Pant Navy Blue Trackpant
description: Composition Dark navy blue tracks made of 100% polyester mesh fabric, with an elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, neon green and teal blue stripe panels on the side seams with a mesh panel over it and embroidered brand name on left leg hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Made of polyester mesh fabric, these adidas tracks are ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. Pair it with sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31"
